release_candidate_required_gates.evidence: go test ./... covers proxy/WebRTC policy, managed extra arg collision, profile lock, dry-run command generation
python3 -m unittest tests.test_detector_harness covers target listing, matrix planning, validation, sanitization rejection, operational timeout, KG JSONL edges
python3 -m unittest tests.test_package_runtime covers platform plan, missing browser rejection, wrapper/browser zip packaging and checksums

release_candidate_required_gates.blocker: Chromium source checkout is a large external dependency and has not been downloaded/indexed in this repo.
No actual patched Chromium binary exists; runtime-artifacts.json remains empty by design until build succeeds.

Registry/config settings and Docker seed loop exist, but current BrowseForge source still needs browseforge-chromium manager dispatch, default/config generation, install/status/doctor/capabilities, and end-to-end launch smoke evidence.
No live detector run can execute until a real runtime binary exists.
Packaging script creates contract-level SBOM/provenance for test inputs; release-grade SBOM/provenance requires real Chromium artifact and DEPS snapshot.
